* Bugs
** High
*** [[./open/109.org][#109]] Fix memory leaks (make test_asan clean)
*** [[./open/128.org][#128]] Auto-generated enum clone in ~initer.til~ is shallow for managed payloads
** Medium
*** [[./open/258.org][#258]] codegen: clone of a borrowed view is elided, moving the borrow (the other half of #250)
*** [[./open/285.org][#285]] Macro arguments reject foldable function-call expressions
** Low
*** [[./open/266.org][#266]] Flaky build_checkers (xvfb-run tmpdir cleanup race in parallel GUI suite)
* Cleanups
** High
*** [[./open/91.org][#91]] Containers: store clone/delete as function pointers instead of dyn_call
*** [[./open/116.org][#116]] Imported files are parsed in isolation
*** [[./open/124.org][#124]] Raw `Dynamic` ownership should not require explicit `free(...)` in til
*** [[./open/130.org][#130]] AST / ~Expr~ representation cleanup
*** [[./open/143.org][#143]] Avoid unnecessary heap round-trips for Expr construction
*** [[./open/146.org][#146]] Unify typer desugar/insert passes into a single walk
*** [[./open/147.org][#147]] AST/Context redesign: lessons from rstil
*** [[./open/158.org][#158]] One pass per phase across the whole pipeline
*** [[./open/163.org][#163]] Per-file AST/import graph + Context.path (prep for removing Expr.path)
*** [[./open/165.org][#165]] Declaration order should not matter inside a file or across imports
*** [[./open/170.org][#170]] All-or-nothing caching for translate/build/run
*** [[./open/171.org][#171]] Stop hardcoding expected output strings in tests.til; use golden/cache files with diffs
*** [[./open/172.org][#172]] Add test_runner regen mode for expected outputs
*** [[./open/174.org][#174]] Container types create cyclic dependencies that block typer-time methodgen
*** [[./open/183.org][#183]] Adding ~///~ comments to core lib files forces full rebuild+test
*** [[./open/192.org][#192]] USize should not be hardwired to U32
*** [[./open/272.org][#272]] Garbager system: single ownership authority, no manual memory outside core
*** [[./open/275.org][#275]] Interpreter manufactures double-ownership at construction; should only interpret the AST's delete/free
** Medium
*** [[./open/231.org][#231]] Use UFCS for standalone functions throughout the codebase
** Low
*** [[./open/70.org][#70]] Constfolder: constant folding for all types (not just scalars)
*** [[./open/90.org][#90]] Til libraries: avoid symbol conflicts between independent libs
*** [[./open/92.org][#92]] Bundle GL headers and linker scripts (zero apt deps)
*** [[./open/101.org][#101]] Deterministic temp variable names in generated C
*** [[./open/115.org][#115]] Reduce primitive special-casing; keep ext_struct, document its contract
*** [[./open/195.org][#195]] Consider removing ~mode test~
*** [[./open/207.org][#207]] Consider removing Vec.move_from
*** [[./open/209.org][#209]] Move the stack-vs-heap Str delete decision out of the builder into the AST
*** [[./open/237.org][#237]] Advanced profiling for the self-host build
*** [[./open/246.org][#246]] Slim down the cross-phase ~Context~ toward the rstil shape
*** [[./open/247.org][#247]] Move layout facts off AST nodes, rstil-style (pairs with #246)
*** [[./open/253.org][#253]] Compiler-wide payload accessors (ref X_of(e)) to collapse extraction switches
*** [[./open/257.org][#257]] Centralize primitive size/align: stop hardcoding I64=8, U8=1, ... in layout code
*** [[./open/278.org][#278]] codegen: faster string switch dispatch (not a C switch)

*** [[./open/182.org][#182]] Support ~/** */~ block doc comments (in addition to ~///~)
